keyFeatures.zh: 自定义密码长度和复杂性

description.en: Generate up to 100 passwords per month

weaknesses.en: Limited to 100 passwords per month for free tier
weaknesses.zh: 免费套餐每月仅限生成100个密码

weaknesses.en: No pricing information available for paid tiers
weaknesses.zh: 未提供付费套餐的价格信息

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses needing password generation
targetAudience.zh: 需要生成密码的个人和小型企业

positioning.en: A simple and free tool for generating passwords
positioning.zh: 一个简单且免费的密码生成工具
